experiment_version_amendment_consistency.name: experiment_version_amendment_consistency
experiment_version_amendment_consistency.value: ("supersedes_version_id" IS NULL AND "change_summary" IS NULL) OR ("supersedes_version_id" IS NOT NULL AND "change_summary" IS NOT NULL AND length(trim("change_summary")) > 0)

member_status_user_consistency.name: member_status_user_consistency
member_status_user_consistency.value: ("status" = 'active' AND "user_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("status" = 'invited' AND "invited_email" IS NOT NULL)
